articles.description: After an immature winter, Harry Brook's mature and majestic century against Pakistan proved he is England's leader for the future, writes Matthew Henry.
articles.title: T20 World Cup: Harry Brook shows he is England's leader for the future

articles.description: Norwegians Bodo/Glimt produce one of the biggest upsets in Champions League history as they knock out last year's finalists Inter Milan to reach the last 16 for the first time.
articles.title: Inter Milan 1-2 Bodo/Glimt (2-5 agg): Norwegians claim stunning success to reach last 16

articles.description: Newcastle United reach the last 16 of the Champions League comfortably with another victory against Qarabag.
articles.title: Newcastle 3-2 Qarabag (agg 9-3): Eddie Howe's side into Champions League last 16

articles.description: Tottenham's heavy north London derby defeat against Arsenal on Sunday just confirmed what everyone already knew - Igor Tudor's team are in serious trouble. BBC Sport assesses their precarious situation, what relegation might bring and asks if they are too big to go down?
articles.title: Tottenham relegation fight: Are north London club too big to go down?

articles.description: Christian Horner says Max Verstappen and his camp were "not responsible" for his exit from Red Bull in 2025.
articles.title: Jos Verstappen was not behind my Red Bull exit, says Christian Horner

articles.description: Floyd Mayweather and Manny Pacquiao fight in September in a rematch of their 2015 blockbuster, but with both men nearning 50 years old, is it a fight that can deliver?
articles.title: Mayweather vs Pacquiao 2: 'Equal in decay' - Mayweather v Pacquiao is another boxing 'carnival'

articles.description: Kansas City Chiefs say they have held positive talks with Travis Kelce over his future but have a plan in place for his retirement.
articles.title: Kansas City Chiefs 'prepared' for Travis Kelce's retirement

articles.description: Alexander Sorloth scores first Champions League hat-trick as Atletico Madrid set up last-16 tie with Liverpool or Spurs.
articles.title: Atletico Madrid 4-1 Club Brugge (7-4 on agg): Alexander Sorloth hat-trick seals last-16 spot

articles.description: Up to fourth in the Premier League after Monday's win at Everton, Champions League qualification would be a big boost to Manchester United's finances after two years outside Europe's elite club competition.
articles.title: Man Utd: Why Champions League return is crucial to Old Trafford club

articles.description: Bayer Leverkusen will face either Arsenal or Bayern Munich in the last-16 of the Champions League after beating Olympiakos over two legs.
articles.title: Stalemate enough to earn Leverkusen place in last 16
